chapter_title.en: Chapter 83 – Fulfilling the need of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/106)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/106)
text: مَا قَضَى مُسْلِمٌ لِمُسْلِمٍ حَاجَةً إِلَّا نَادَاهُ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى عَلَيَّ ثَوَابُكَ وَ لَا أَرْضَى لَكَ بِدُونِ الْجَنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Is’haq, from Bakr Bin Muhammad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A Muslim will not fulfil a need of the Muslim except that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High would Call out: “Upon Me<sup>azwj</sup> is your Reward, and I<sup>azwj</sup> will not be Pleased for you (as a Reward), less than the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 7. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Ishaq from Bakr ibn Muhammad from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whenever a Muslim helps make the wish of a Muslim to come true, Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, says, ‘With Me is your reward and I will not agree to allow it to be less than paradise.’”
